song.title: Psalms 23
song.presentation: v1 c v2 c v3 c v4 c v5 c
song.lyrics: [v1] The Lord is my Shepherd forever, He maketh me down to lie, He leads me beside the still waters O how He does satisfy! [c] Surely goodness and mercy shall follow me All the days, all the days of my life; Surely goodness and mercy shall follow me All the days, all the days of my life. And I shall dwell in the house of the Lord forever, And I shall feast at the table spread for me; Surely goodness and mercy shall follow me All the days, all the days of my life. [v2] My Shepherd Himself is my pasture, My Shepherd, the waters of rest; I eat of His riches in spirit, I drink, and O how I am blest! [v3] My Shepherd my soul is restoring, My will, and emotion, and mind; And though through the valley I’m walking, O what a companion I find! [v4] A table prepared by my Shepherd I feast on and Satan destroy; My head is anointed with oil, My cup runneth over with joy! [v5] And now in His house I am dwelling Enjoying the goodness of God; My pleasure is far beyond telling, My pleasure is Jesus my Lord!
